data.reasoningText:
The user migrated from VSTest to Microsoft.Testing.Platform and is getting exit code 8 when test assemblies produce zero tests. This is a known behavioral difference - Microsoft.Testing.Platform returns a non-zero exit code (8) when no tests are discovered, whereas VSTest treated this as a success.

Let me look at their project files to understand the setup.

data.content:
This is a known behavioral difference. Microsoft.Testing.Platform returns **exit code 8** ("no tests found") when zero tests are discovered, whereas VSTest returned 0.

The fix is a single MSBuild property. Add this to your `.csproj`:

arguments.new_str:
<TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>
    <!-- Treat "no tests discovered" as success (exit code 0 instead of 8). -->
    <TestingPlatformShowTestsFailure>false</TestingPlatformShowTestsFailure>

<TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>
    <!-- Treat "no tests discovered" as success (exit code 0 instead of 8). -->
    <TestingPlatformShowTestsFailure>false</TestingPlatformShowTestsFailure>

data.content: Found it! `--minimum-expected-tests` rejects `0`. The correct option is `--ignore-exit-code 8`. Let me verify:
data.reasoningText:
Key findings:

1. `--minimum-expected-tests` expects a **non-zero positive integer** - so 0 is not accepted!
2. But there's `--ignore-exit-code` which allows you to ignore specific exit codes like `8`!

So the correct fix is `--ignore-exit-code 8`.

data.content:
**The fix:** Microsoft.Testing.Platform returns exit code **8** for "zero tests discovered" (VSTest returned 0). Add this to your `.csproj`:

```xml
<TestingPlatformCommandLineArguments>--ignore-exit-code 8</TestingPlatformCommandLineArguments>
```

This tells the platform to map exit code 8 → 0 while still failing on actual test failures (exit code 2) or errors. If you have multiple test projects, put this in a `Directory.Build.props` so it applies everywhere.

Alternatively, you can pass it per-invocation: `dotnet test -- --ignore-exit-code 8`.
